title: Outcome Roadmap
use_when: Use when converting a feature roadmap into an outcome roadmap, making roadmap communication more strategic, or reframing initiatives around impact.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Outcome Roadmap when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Outcome-focused roadmap that rewrites feature work into user and business outcomes
framework_fit: Best for product leaders who need roadmap items to communicate why the work matters, not just what will ship.
failure_modes: Produces Outcome-focused roadmap that rewrites feature work into user and business outcomes without tying recommendations to the user's Plan stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Outcome Roadmap as generic Delivery advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Outcome Roadmap when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $outcome-roadmap to turn this roadmap context into a decision-ready Outcome-focused roadmap that rewrites feature work into user and business outcomes.
examples.expected_artifact: Outcome-focused roadmap that rewrites feature work into user and business outcomes
